text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I feel lightheaded... I don't think I can train
like this...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll... go over there and collect myself for a
moment...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm back... Back here in my world...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's so... relaxing here... Oh, the sky... it's a clock
today...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The sun's the long hand and the moon's the short
hand... Hehe. A sun that doesn't set... and a moon
that never wanes.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Much like the cycle of reincarnation... Time flows
in circles...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Time? I feel like something has slipped my
mind...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh... The fish are... flying? That's right, the sea of
clouds is in high tide...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If I try it now, it should be safe to swim... I think?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It looks fun, but I shouldn't... If I do...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ah, the tide will go back out if I don't hurry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Manhattan Cafe ends up skipping
training...
